text: For many Americans, an employer 401k plan is an important step towards a secure future.
Financial advisors who work with business owners know the need is real,
but navigating workplace retirement is incredibly inefficient and overwhelming.
That's where Aboon comes in. We saw how hard it was for advisors to offer
retirement plans without getting bogged down in paperwork, emails, and calls.
We built Aboon to change that. Aboon makes workplace retirement simple,
streamlined, and accessible for advisors and business owners.
With Aboon, advisors can win plans in minutes instead of weeks.
Aboon combines AI-powered workflows with real-time human support to help financial
advisors deliver 401ks quickly and easily. With powerful features like our sample census,
you can design tailored plans without client data and get right to winning plans with busy clients.
And thanks to our partnerships with trusted record keepers,
onboarding a plan has never been easier. You and your client can manage plans on our dashboard
and know that our always-on compliance tools have you covered.
What Aboon means for financial advisors like you is that you can focus on growing your business
and showing up for your clients. We've worked with many advisors who have never sold a retirement
plan until they try to Aboon. With our intuitive platform and outstanding service,
we make all advisors feel like pros, no matter their level of experience. Most importantly,
it gives you the confidence to bring 401ks to even more clients.
Aboon makes it easy for financial advisors to launch and manage retirement plans.
Aboon is built for you, for your clients, for what's next.
